belier.intro: The waxing gibbous Moon at 85 percent sits in Sagittarius, lighting your ninth house of horizons and belief. Neptune retrograde continues to move through your own sign, softening the edges of your certainty about who you are becoming. The Leo Sun warms your fifth house of creative risk, and together these currents ask you to widen your view before you narrow your next move.
belier.love: A partner's story about their own convictions opens a wider conversation than usual today. Let curiosity lead instead of the need to be right, and the exchange becomes genuinely enriching rather than a debate to win.
belier.work: A plan that reaches beyond your usual territory, travel, publishing, teaching, deserves real consideration now. The gibbous light favors bold expansion over cautious refinement; trust the scale of what you are imagining.
belier.energy: Your fire burns outward today, restless for horizons rather than tasks. Physical movement in open air channels this expansive energy far better than a desk ever could.
belier.intuition: Neptune's fog around your own identity lifts slightly when you stop asking who you should be and start noticing who you already are becoming. The answer arrives sideways, not head on.
belier.mantra: I trust the wider view I am beginning to see.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: Sagittarius holds the waxing gibbous Moon in your eighth house today, a place where trust and shared resources meet real scrutiny. Neptune retrograde continues its slow work in your twelfth house, dissolving illusions you have carried about what you owe yourself in rest. The Leo Sun lights your fourth house of home, asking that your private foundations feel as solid as your public ones.
taureau.love: Vulnerability with a partner about money, need, or emotional dependence deepens intimacy rather than threatening it today. What you fear will divide you may in fact be the bridge.
taureau.work: Shared finances, joint contracts, or a negotiation benefit from directness now. The gibbous Moon supports pushing a stalled conversation toward resolution rather than letting it drift further.
taureau.energy: Your earth steadies you even as deeper currents move beneath the surface. Ground yourself through touch, food, and familiar routines rather than trying to think your way through this.
taureau.intuition: A quiet signal about someone's true intentions toward shared resources deserves attention. Your body often registers this kind of truth before your mind catches up.
taureau.mantra: I let real intimacy replace the comfort of illusion.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Moon in Sagittarius moves through your seventh house of partnership under a waxing gibbous sky, throwing bright and sometimes uncomfortable light on your closest bonds. Neptune retrograde in your eleventh house keeps questioning which friendships are built on shared reality and which on shared fantasy. The Leo Sun in your third house keeps your voice lively even as your relationships ask for something more honest than charm.
gemeaux.love: A partner may want more direct commitment or clarity than your usual wit can deflect today. Answer plainly; the gibbous Moon rewards honesty over cleverness in matters of the heart.
gemeaux.work: Negotiations and collaborative work move forward well today, especially where a second opinion sharpens your own thinking. Say the harder thing out loud rather than smoothing it over.
gemeaux.energy: Mental energy seeks a partner or mirror today rather than solitary output. Conversation itself becomes a form of productive work.
gemeaux.intuition: Notice which group or friendship keeps asking you to perform rather than simply be present. That distinction is unusually clear right now.
gemeaux.mantra: I choose honesty over charm in what matters most.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: Sagittarius carries the waxing gibbous Moon through your sixth house of daily rhythm and service today, asking practical questions about how your routines actually serve you. Neptune retrograde continues in your tenth house, keeping your sense of professional purpose in a state of honest revision. The Leo Sun in your own second house draws attention to what you value and how you sustain it.
cancer.love: Small daily gestures matter more than grand declarations in a close relationship right now. Notice who shows up for the ordinary moments; that is where the real answer lives.
cancer.work: A health or scheduling adjustment you have delayed becomes more urgent to address today. The gibbous Moon favors decisive correction over further deliberation.
cancer.energy: Your water element wants purpose channeled into practical care today, not abstraction. Tend to your body's actual needs rather than what you think they should be.
cancer.intuition: A nagging sense about your career direction, present since Neptune turned retrograde, sharpens today into something almost speakable. Write it down before it slips.
cancer.mantra: I trust the small truths my daily life is showing me.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Sun in your own sign meets a waxing gibbous Moon in Sagittarius lighting your fifth house of creative expression and joy. Neptune retrograde continues to move through your ninth house, quietly testing which of your beliefs are genuinely yours and which were borrowed for convenience. This is a bright, expansive day built for bold self-expression tempered by honest reflection.
lion.love: Romance benefits from generosity and playfulness today rather than caution. Let yourself be seen fully; the gibbous Moon rewards those who take the emotional risk first.
lion.work: A creative project gains real momentum now, especially one connected to teaching, publishing, or sharing your perspective widely. Confidence serves you better than perfectionism today.
lion.energy: Your fire burns bright and generous, made for performance and connection rather than solitude. Share your energy visibly rather than holding it in reserve.
lion.intuition: A belief you have held about your own creative worth is quietly being tested by Neptune's retrograde. Trust the version of the truth that feels most alive, not most convenient.
lion.mantra: I express myself boldly and trust what is truly mine.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The waxing gibbous Moon in Sagittarius fills your fourth house today, asking searching questions about the emotional state of your home and roots. Neptune retrograde continues its patient work in your eighth house, dissolving illusions about what real intimacy requires from you. The Leo Sun in your twelfth house adds a layer of private processing beneath your usual practical exterior.
vierge.love: An old family pattern may surface in how you relate to a partner today. Naming it plainly, rather than managing it quietly, is the more useful path forward.
vierge.work: Working from home or handling domestic matters alongside professional ones proves unexpectedly productive today. Let the two blend rather than forcing strict separation.
vierge.energy: Your earth element craves a settled, tended space today. A small act of care for your home environment restores more than an equivalent effort elsewhere would.
vierge.intuition: A quiet realization about what genuine closeness actually costs you emotionally is worth sitting with rather than immediately solving.
vierge.mantra: I tend my roots so they can hold real intimacy.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: Sagittarius holds the waxing gibbous Moon in your third house of communication and immediate connections. Neptune retrograde continues in your seventh house, keeping the truth about a key partnership in slow, honest focus. The Leo Sun in your eleventh house favors friendships and communities that reflect who you actually want to become.
balance.love: A direct conversation with a partner clears air that has been thick with unspoken assumption. The gibbous light favors words spoken plainly over diplomatic hedging today.
balance.work: Networking, writing, and short-range planning all move smoothly now. A colleague's honest feedback, even if blunt, contains something genuinely useful.
balance.energy: Your air element wants exchange today, ideas moving between people rather than staying private. Seek out conversation rather than solitary reflection.
balance.intuition: Notice what a close partner's words are revealing beneath their surface meaning. Neptune's retrograde continues to make the gap between appearance and truth unusually visible.
balance.mantra: I speak plainly and trust what honesty reveals.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The waxing gibbous Moon in Sagittarius illuminates your second house of resources and self-worth today. Neptune retrograde continues in your sixth house, quietly stripping the illusions from your daily habits and how sustainable they truly are. The Leo Sun in your tenth house keeps your professional reputation firmly in view.
scorpion.love: What you feel you deserve in a relationship comes into sharper focus today. Do not settle for less than the gibbous Moon's clarity is showing you.
scorpion.work: A financial decision or a negotiation about your worth benefits from confidence now. State your value plainly; ambiguity serves no one in this phase.
scorpion.energy: Your water runs deep but today asks for practical expression, tending to your body and your resources with equal seriousness.
scorpion.intuition: A habit you have quietly known is not serving you becomes impossible to ignore today. Trust that clarity over the comfort of routine.
scorpion.mantra: I know my worth and act from that knowledge.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon in your own sign grows toward fullness at 85 percent today, lighting your first house of identity and direct self-expression. Neptune retrograde continues in your fifth house, quietly testing whether your creative pursuits reflect who you truly are or who you once wanted to be seen as. The Leo Sun in your ninth house fans the flames of your natural love for expansion.
sagittaire.love: You feel more visible and more yourself in a relationship today, and that authenticity draws a genuine response from a partner. Do not shrink to make anyone comfortable.
sagittaire.work: Bold action on a long-held ambition is favored strongly today. The nearly full Moon in your own sign amplifies your natural confidence; use it deliberately.
sagittaire.energy: Your fire burns at near-peak intensity today, restless and eager for expansion. Physical activity outdoors channels this abundant energy well.
sagittaire.intuition: A creative pursuit that once felt purely joyful may now feel tangled with a need for recognition. Notice the difference; it matters more than it seems.
sagittaire.mantra: I show up fully as myself, without apology.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The waxing gibbous Moon in Sagittarius moves through your twelfth house today, a quiet space of processing and retreat even as the light outside grows brighter. Neptune retrograde continues in your fourth house, dissolving illusions about your family history and what home truly means to you. The Leo Sun in your eighth house asks for honesty in your closest bonds.
capricorne.love: A vulnerable admission to a partner about something you rarely show anyone deepens the bond considerably today. Let yourself be less guarded than usual.
capricorne.work: Behind-the-scenes work, research, or quiet preparation serves you better today than public visibility. Trust the value of what is not yet ready to be seen.
capricorne.energy: Your earth element benefits from rest today, even amid a bright lunar phase. Solitude restores you more than activity will.
capricorne.intuition: A dream or a passing memory carries more meaning than it first appears. Neptune's retrograde in your fourth house continues to surface old, unresolved family material worth examining.
capricorne.mantra: I let quiet honesty deepen what matters most.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The waxing gibbous Moon in Sagittarius lights your eleventh house of community and shared vision today. Pluto retrograde continues its long transformation through your own sign, slowly rebuilding your sense of personal power from the inside out. The Leo Sun in your seventh house keeps a key partnership firmly in focus.
verseau.love: A partner may ask you to show more of your authentic self rather than the version you present to groups. This is uncomfortable and worthwhile in equal measure today.
verseau.work: Collaborative projects and network-building move forward well now. A shared goal gains real traction when you commit to it publicly rather than keeping it private.
verseau.energy: Your air element seeks collective momentum today, ideas and energy moving between many people at once. Let a group carry some of your usual solitary effort.
verseau.intuition: Pluto's retrograde continues to surface which parts of your identity were built for belonging and which are genuinely your own. That distinction sharpens today.
verseau.mantra: I build my power from what is genuinely mine.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The waxing gibbous Moon in Sagittarius moves through your tenth house today, placing your public reputation and career direction in bright focus. Neptune, your ruling planet, continues retrograde through your first house, deepening a long season of redefining who you are outside of others' expectations. The Leo Sun in your sixth house grounds this expansive energy in daily practical service.
poissons.love: A partner notices a shift in how you present yourself to the world lately, and their reaction to it deserves honest attention today. Let their feedback inform you without letting it define you.
poissons.work: A career move or public commitment benefits from bold clarity now rather than your usual quiet drift. State your direction plainly, even if it feels exposing.
poissons.energy: Your water element wants visible momentum today rather than private reflection. Let your usual sensitivity fuel decisive action instead of hesitation.
poissons.intuition: Neptune's long retrograde through your own sign continues to ask who you are becoming beneath the roles you play. Today offers an unusually clear glimpse of the answer.
poissons.mantra: I let my truest self be visible to the world.
poissons.author: Sibylle
